name: Pork Carnitas Tacos

ingredients.item: of broth, vegetable, chicken or beef

method: Make pieces of pork shoulder, and put them in a slow cooker.
Mix chili powder, salt, lime juice, ground cumin, garlic powder, dried
oregano, onion powder, and black pepper.
Then coat the pork slices with seasonings.
Cook while keeping it covered for around 4 hours on medium heat.
When it is cooked, take out and shred.
Put chopped cilantro in it and serve in tacos.
Make pieces of pork shoulder. Put them in an Instant Pot.
Mix salt, lime juice, ground cumin, garlic powder, chili powder, dried
oregano, onion powder, broth, and black pepper.
Then coat the pork slices with seasonings.
Cook for around 40 minutes on high pressure.
Add chopped cilantro, and serve in tacos.
